Confidential—Internal Board Memo (KSA issuer): selective disclosure, PDPL, closed period controls, and acquisition workflow
Issuer: Al Mithaq Industrial Co. (CR: 1 0 1 - 7 7 0 - 5 5 5 5 5), listed on the Riyadh Securities Exchange (RSE); symbol: AMIQ; subject relates to draft Q2 results and a proposed acquisition
Public-status check: RSE announcement dated 1447/05/11H (corresp. 2026-10-15G) on renewal of a SAR 180m revolving facility is public and stale; ref: http://rse.example.sa/ann?aid=K1447-05-AMIQ-0001
MNPI—non-public: management’s internal flash shows Q2 net profit approx. +18% vs guidance; calendar invite “Q2 beat 18%” was sent to selected lenders; this is selective disclosure risk under the Authority’s market-conduct rules
MNPI—non-public: draft SPA to acquire Darah Logistics LLC at enterprise value ~SAR 215m (~12% of total assets) is pending signature next week; material to the issuer and requires immediate disclosure on signing via the RSE Announcements portal
Closed period: per KCMA Listing Rules, insiders are in a trading blackout from 30/06/1447H until publication of interim results on the RSE; do not brief sell-side or vendors until the announcement posts
Insider roster (PDPL touchpoint): Eng. Fahd Al‑Habashi (CFO), Iqama No.: 2 0 5 • 9 1 • 0 3 • 4 2 1; Ms. Noura Al‑Qadi (Compliance), mobile masked x5x-xx7x; these identifiers are personal data under PDPL and must not be shared outside approved channels
Counterparty records include Darah Logistics CR: 7 0 3 - 3 3 2 - 9 9 8 8 and contact Mr. Sami Al‑Qurashi, Iqama ref 2-1-7-0-4-3-9 (redacted); sharing such files with our cloud DMS in eu‑w2 requires S D A I A cross‑border transfer assessment and SCC‑style safeguards
Data minimization: circulate only initials in board packs (e.g., F.A.H.), and use the NDA‑KSA template DPA before any vendor uploads
Selective disclosure controls: disable external forwarding on “Project Rimal” WhatsApp/Teams groups; brief procurement that price lists alone are not material, but any forecast uplift tied to the SPA must be withheld until the RSE post
Negative note for precision: our public blog post on SahimPro v4.2 UI labels (https://ir.almithaq.example.com/news/2026/ui‑labels) and yesterday’s generic HR policy update are not material and not MNPI
Legal view: no MAC is asserted or expected at this time; neither the previously announced facility renewal nor routine warehouse relocation in Maysaan Logistics Park triggers immediate disclosure
Required steps: finalize the announcement draft for posting within minutes of SPA signing; pre‑clear talking points with the Authority’s market‑conduct desk; ensure insiders acknowledge closed‑period notice
Queries may be directed to Ms. Noura Al‑Qadi, Compliance Officer, n.alqadi@almithaq.example.com or to disclosures@rse.example.sa; backup: +966‑5x‑xxx‑23x1
